tracks.rawText: 1:06[Rec] Apr 1 08:10:44UploadSpanish language boom bap hip hop, A steady 90 BPM beat features a crisp snare on the backbeat and a syncopated kick pattern, The melodic foundation consists of a repetitive, minor-key piano loop with a slightly lo-fi, filtered texture, A deep, melodic electric bassline follows the piano progression with subtle slides, A female rapper delivers rhythmic, multi-syllabic verses with a confident, forward placement, Occasional record scratch effects and subtle vinyl crackle are present in the background, The arrangement is minimalist, focusing on the interplay between the vocal flow and the steady drum groove4PublishRemix
